name: classrpg-backend
description: ClassRPG Gamified Education Platform - Backend API

scripts.db:setup: node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const { DATABASE_URL, DB, USE_DB_SSL } = await import('./src/config.js'); const pg = await import('pg'); const pool = new pg.Pool(DATABASE_URL ? { connectionString: DATABASE_URL, ssl: USE_DB_SSL ? { rejectUnauthorized: false } : false } : DB); const schema = readFileSync('./schema.sql', 'utf8'); const seed = readFileSync('./seed.sql', 'utf8'); await pool.query(schema); await pool.query(seed); await pool.end(); console.log('✅ Database setup complete'); process.exit(0);"
